name: Ag Geek Speak
host: A Podcast for Precision Agriculture Geeks
description: GK Technology Inc Team Members, Jodi Boe and Sarah Lovas talk about precision agriculture, agriculture mapping, agronomy and drainage.

recent_episodes.title: 1. Talking Cybersecurity with Tech Support Farm's Chris Sherman
recent_episodes.description:
We sit down with Chris Sherman of Tech Support Farm to explore how cybercrime targets modern agriculture and what practical steps protect farms and agribusinesses from losses. From avoiding spoofed invoices to equipment lockouts, we share simple defenses any grower, consultant, or retailer can start today.

In this epsiode, we discuss with Chris

• why agriculture is a prime target for cybercrime
• social engineering that targets busy planting and harvest seasons
• real case

recent_episodes.title: 0.5 Tiny Bytes - Value of NAIP Imagery In Ag Mapping
recent_episodes.description:
Sarah and Jodi discuss NAIP aerial imagery and why this high-resolution imagery is invaluable for precision agriculture work in the United States. They share workflows for validating zones, aligning layers, and spotting year-over-year patterns while noting timing pitfalls, thanks to NAIP imagery as a background source.

In this episode, we discuss...

• what NAIP is and who collects it
• benefits of high resolution often associated with newer NAIP imagery
• four-band imagery

recent_episodes.title: 20. Using Autonomous Tractors on the Farm with Matt Krueger
recent_episodes.description:
We talk with Matt Krueger about his field-level view of autonomous tillage with a 9R series John Deere tractor, from kit installation to dust-driven safety stops, and how better boundaries and AutoPath boost both uptime and data quality. Matt's story centers on labor flexibility, real costs, and where autonomy should expand next.

In this special hour-long episode we talk:
• autonomy kit details, JDLink Boost connectivity, dual receivers
• autonomy-grade boundaries and safe offse

contact_name: A Podcast for Precision Agriculture Geeks
score_reason: Precision agriculture and technology podcast that could align with AI applications in agriculture, though more technical than strategic.

key_themes: Precision agriculture technology and data interpretation
Soil science and variable-rate field management
Practical troubleshooting and real-world farm implementation
Agronomy-first decision making over tech-first approaches
enrichment.relevant_episode: 18. Yes, He Mapped The Lawns Too Preston Sundeen Pt. 1 — Both Andreas and Preston bridge the gap between technical precision ag tools and practical, critical thinking; both emphasize how to teach farmers to ask better questions rather than just push buttons.
enrichment.coverage_gap: How AI and data analytics can help traditional commodity boards and growers make smarter field-level decisions (beyond soil sampling and NDVI); the business case for data-driven agriculture in conservative farming operations.
enrichment.suggested_hook: From commodity boards to AI: how traditional agriculture can stop guessing and start winning with data—without the hype.
